title: nepeta hystrix
intro: Nepeta hystrix, also known as Catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds, calm digestive issues, and reduce fever. The health benefits of Nepeta hystrix include its ability to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, while also promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Nepeta hystrix can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and provide relief from various health issues.
